mapper.select: SELECT * FROM posts ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE posts SET view_count = view_count + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{postId}
UPDATE posts SET like_count = like_count + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{postId}
UPDATE posts SET comment_count = comment_count + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{postId}
UPDATE posts SET like_count = GREATEST(like_count - 1, 0), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{postId}
UPDATE posts SET comment_count = GREATEST(comment_count - 1, 0), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{postId}
mapper.select:
SELECT p.*, u.id as author_id, u.username as author_username, u.nickname as author_nickname, u.avatar_url as author_avatar_url,
CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM post_likes pl WHERE pl.post_id = p.id AND pl.user_id = #{userId} ) THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END as liked
FALSE as liked
FROM posts p INNER JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.id INNER JOIN user_follows uf ON u.id = uf.following_id WHERE uf.follower_id = #{userId} AND p.status = 1 AND p.visibility = 1 ORDER BY p.published_at DESC

SELECT p.*, u.id as author_id, u.username as author_username, u.nickname as author_nickname, u.avatar_url as author_avatar_url, FALSE as liked FROM posts p INNER JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.id INNER JOIN post_tags pt ON p.id = pt.post_id WHERE pt.tag_id = #{tagId} AND p.status = 1 AND p.visibility = 1 ORDER BY p.published_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO post_likes (user_id, post_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{postId})
